en_title: Monster Hunter Wilds Confirmed for Nintendo Switch 2
cn_title: 《任天堂》《怪物猎人：荒野》确认登陆Nintendo Switch 2
subtitle: 猎人们，新平台来了
opus_summary: 卡普空宣布《怪物猎人：荒野》正在为Nintendo Switch 2开发，未公布发售日期。该作此前登陆PC、PS5和Xbox Series，此次移植满足粉丝期待。同时公布新资料片《Ascendance》，计划2027年推出。

paragraphs.en: Capcom has confirmed that Monster Hunter Wilds is in development for Nintendo Switch 2.
paragraphs.cn: 卡普空已确认《怪物猎人：荒野》正在为Nintendo Switch 2开发中。

paragraphs.en: The publisher behind the popular action-RPG promised a new version of its 2025 installment just hours after Summer Game Fest 2026 came to a close yesterday. It's the kind of announcement most players would have expected to see show up at a bigger summer showcase, or maybe even a Nintendo Direct, but instead, Capcom made its announcement with a simple two-sentence post on X/Twitter .
paragraphs.cn: 这家热门动作RPG的发行商在昨日2026年夏日游戏节结束后仅数小时，便承诺为其2025年作品推出新版本。这种公告多数玩家本以为会在更大的夏季展示会甚至任天堂直面会上公布，但卡普空却仅通过X平台发布了一条两句话的帖子。

paragraphs.en: "Monster Hunter Wilds is currently in development for Nintendo Switch 2!" Capcom said. "We'll have more info to share, including the release date, in the future."
paragraphs.cn: 「《怪物猎人：荒野》目前正在为Nintendo Switch 2开发中！」卡普空表示，「我们未来会分享更多信息，包括发售日期。」

paragraphs.en: Monster Hunter Wilds skipped out on Switch when it launched for PC, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X | S in February 2025. It made sense considering that release date fell so late into the life cycle of the Nintendo's original hybrid device but months before its sequel . Still, Nintendo consoles have been home to many Monster Hunter entries in the past, leaving fans to hope for a port for the last year.
paragraphs.cn: 《怪物猎人：荒野》于2025年2月登陆PC、PS5和Xbox Series X|S时，并未推出Switch版本。考虑到该发售时间已处于初代Switch生命周期的末期，且距其后续机型仅数月之遥，这一决定合情合理。不过，任天堂主机历来是众多《怪物猎人》作品的阵地，因此粉丝们过去一年来一直期盼着移植版。

paragraphs.en: While a release date for Monster Hunter Wilds on Switch 2 has yet to be revealed, it looks that wait will soon come to an end. It's unclear how this new version will differ from experiences currently offered on other platforms.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然《怪物猎人：荒野》Switch 2版的发售日期尚未公布，但看来等待即将结束。目前尚不清楚这一新版本与其他平台现有体验有何不同。

paragraphs.en: Capcom's announcement arrived just after it took to Summer Game Fest 2026 to reveal Monster Hunter Wilds' latest expansion, Ascendance. A trailer for the new content (below) teased a new land and abilities to explore when it launches for PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X | S at some point in 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 卡普空在2026年夏日游戏节上公布了《怪物猎人：荒野》的最新资料片《Ascendance》，随后便发布了上述公告。新内容的预告片（如下）展示了一片新大陆和可供探索的新能力，该资料片将于2027年登陆PC、PS5和Xbox Series X|S。

paragraphs.en: IGN gave Monster Hunter Wilds an 8/10 review upon its launch early last year. For more on everything announced at last night's show, you can click here .
paragraphs.cn: IGN在去年初《怪物猎人：荒野》发售时给出了8/10的评测。如需了解更多昨晚发布会上公布的内容，可点击此处。

pending_dict.reason: 暂无官方中文译名，保留英文
